---
title: "Rāg Bhairavī"
subtitle: "*Nāda parama vidyā*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Raṅganāth &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Suraphāktāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> nāda parama vidyā dehi bhavānī <br> nisa dina mange tose rāga tāla bāṇī

**Antarā**

> suta raṅganātha tujha caraṇa jugala dhyānī <br> gāve bajāve jaya jaya śiva rāṇī

**Sañcārī**

> āgama nigama gaṇeśa nārada śūlapāṇi <br> bhṛṅgī ādi muni jana pūje joḍa pāṇi

**Ābhog**

> ita nāhin anta kahi na pāve bhavānī <br> apani ye jasa kṛpā kīje muḍhe karo jñānī

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Suraphāktāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **4 + 2 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, tali **2** at beat 5, and tali **3** at beat 7.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | - | m | m | P | m | g | - | g | - |
| **nā** | **-** | **da** | **pa** | **ra** | **ma** | **vi** | **-** | **dyā** | ** ** |
| r | S | r | m | g | - | r | - | S | - |
| **de** | **-** | **hi** | **bha** | **vā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **nī** | **-** |
| S | S | d | d | P | n | d | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - |
| **ni** | **sa** | **di** | **na** | **ma** | **-** | **nge** | **to** | **se** | **-** |
| m | n | d | P | g | m | $\lb{gr}$ | - | S | - |
| **rā** | **-** | **ga** | **tā** | **-** | **la** | **bā** | **-** | **ṇī** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| d | d | n | n | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **su** | **ta** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **nā** | **-** | **tha** | **tu** | **-** | **jha** |
| d | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | - | P | - |
| **ca** | **ra** | **ṇa** | **ju** | **ga** | **la** | **dhyā** | **-** | **nī** | **-** |
| S | - | d | d | P | n | d | P | m | g |
| **gā** | **-** | **ve** | **ba** | **jā** | **-** | **ve** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| m | n | d | P | g | m | g | r | S | - |
| **ja** | **ya** | **ja** | **ya** | **śi** | **va** | **rā** | **-** | **nī** | **-** |

:::

## Sañcārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | S | d | d | P | P | m | g | - | g |
| **ā** | **ga** | **ma** | **ni** | **ga** | **ma** | **ga** | **ṇe** | **-** | **śa** |
| S | r | g | m | g | g | r | - | S | - |
| **nā** | **-** | **ra** | **da** | **śū** | **la** | **pā** | **-** | **ṇi** | **-** |
| S | $\mn{n}$ | $\mn{d}$ | $\mn{n}$ | S | - | S | - | g | g |
| **bh** | **iṛ** | **-** | **ṅgī** | **ā** | **-** | **di** | **-** | **mu** | **ni** |
| m | m | d | P | m | g | g | r | - | S |
| **ja** | **na** | **pū** | **je** | **jo** | **-** | **ḍa** | **pā** | **-** | **ṇi** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| d | d | n | n | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **i** | **ta** | **nā** | **hin** | **a** | **-** | **nta** | **ka** | **hi** | **na** |
| d | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | $\tr{S}$ | S | S |
| **pā** | **-** | **ve** | **-** | **bha** | **vā** | **-** | **nī** | **a** | **pa** |
| d | d | d | d | d | P | n | d | - | P |
| **nī** | **ye** | **ja** | **sa** | **kṛ** | **pā** | **-** | **kī** | **-** | **je** |
| g | m | P | n | d | P | m | g | r | S |
| **mu** | **-** | **ḍhe** | **-** | **ka** | **ro** | **jñā** | **-** | **-** | **nī** |

:::
